channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: U.S. Plans Kenya Quarantine Facility for Americans Exposed to Ebola
item.description:
The Trump administration is establishing a 50-bed quarantine facility at a Kenyan airbase for Americans exposed to Ebola, marking a sharp break from decades of U.S. policy and drawing fierce opposition from Kenyan doctors, CDC officials, and global health experts who call the move both unprecedented and dangerous.

Key points:
• The quarantine center will reportedly be built near Manda Bay Airfield in Kenya and operated with U.S. military logistical support.
• Officials say the facility is intended to isolate American citizens exposed during Ebola response operations in Central and East Africa.
• Kenyan medical associations and public health experts have criticized the plan, warning it could strain local healthcare infrastructure and increase regional panic.
• Former CDC officials argue the proposal departs from longstanding U.S. containment protocols that traditionally manage high-risk patients on American soil.

Read the full article: U.S. Plans Kenya Quarantine Facility for Americans Exposed to Ebola

item.title: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?
item.description:
Inside the OCIF "Croqueta Fee" allegations involving Natalia Zequeira, Allied Fleet Services, AAA Car Rental, and Puerto Rico's financial regulator.

Read the full article: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
